2606.22307.title: Enhancing Protein Representation Learning via Manifold Restore Mixing
2606.22307.paper_summary: Data augmentation (DA) has been proven to be an effective means for improving protein representation learning (PRL) by generating additional training samples. Although mainstream perturbation- and sampling-based augmentation methods can produce data containing sufficient variations, they carry the risk of disrupting the protein structure and function. Some crafted protein homology modeling tools can generate conformations, but reduce structural diversity. The above dilemmas lead us to a question: Can we restore the disrupted structure caused by DA operations, providing data with both the original structure and diverse variations? In this work, we first analyze and empirically reveal the structure defect and performance degradation issues of existing DA methods. Based on the findings, we propose a simple yet effective DA method, Manifold Restore Mixing (MRM), for protein representation learning. Specifically, inspired by manifold mixup, we mix the hidden representations of original and augmented protein data to generate new samples that restore structural information lost in DA while introducing diverse variations. Furthermore, we develop a sample difficulty scheduler that adjusts the beta distribution in mixup to provide models with progressively challenging mixed samples during training, which improves the final performance. Comprehensive experiments on various PRL backbones and downstream tasks demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of our method. The complete code and weights will be released upon acceptance. We provide a implementation at https://github.com/KingGugu/MRM.
2606.22307.paper_summary_zh: 數據增強（DA）已被證明是通過生成額外的訓練樣本來改善蛋白質表示學習（PRL）的有效手段。<lb/>儘管主流的擾動和採樣基礎增強方法可以產生包含足夠變化的數據，但它們存在破壞蛋白質結構和功能的風險。<lb/>一些精心設計的蛋白質同源建模工具可以生成構象，但會降低結構多樣性。<lb/>上述困境使我們產生了一個問題：我們能否恢復由DA操作造成的破壞結構，提供同時具有原始結構和多樣變化的數據？<lb/>在這項工作中，我們首先分析並實證揭示了現有DA方法的結構缺陷和性能下降問題。<lb/>基於這些發現，我們提出了一種簡單而有效的DA方法，即流形恢復混合（MRM），用於蛋白質表示學習。<lb/>具體而言，受到流形混合的啟發，我們混合原始和增強蛋白質數據的隱藏表示，以生成新的樣本，恢復在DA中丟失的結構信息，同時引入多樣的變化。<lb/>此外，我們開發了一個樣本難度調度器，調整混合中的beta分佈，以在訓練過程中為模型提供逐步挑戰的混合樣本，從而改善最終性能。<lb/>在各種PRL骨幹和下游任務上的綜合實驗證明了我們方法的有效性和泛化能力。<lb/>完整的代碼和權重將在接受後發布。<lb/>我們在 https://github.com/KingGugu/MRM 提供了一個實現。
2606.22307.author: Yizhou Dang et.al.
2606.22307.authors: Yizhou Dang, Chuang Zhao, Lianbo Ma, Guibing Guo, Xingwei Wang, Zhu Sun
